archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast adapted for Apple-style Premium Tech)

brand_identity.name: DIGIACTIVA.COM
brand_identity.concept: Helping Chilean entrepreneurs and SMBs digitalize, organize, and grow using simple AI and tech solutions.
brand_identity.core_message: Digitaliza, ordena y activa tu negocio
brand_identity.target_audience: Chilean entrepreneurs, SMBs, small businesses, independent professionals

typography.guidelines: Avoid default fonts like Inter. Headings must have tight tracking. Emphasize contrast using font weights (e.g., Light vs Medium).

spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous spacing: use py-24 to py-32 for sections, gap-8 to gap-12 for grids.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento grid for services and features. Use Mode A 'Tetris' for dynamic layout.

surfaces_and_glassmorphism.glass_card: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl backdrop-saturate-150 border border-white/40 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] rounded-3xl
surfaces_and_glassmorphism.header_nav: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200/50

animations.scroll: Smooth scroll enabled (Lenis recommended), staggered entrance animations for grids.
animations.interactions: Scale up slightly on button click/press.

components_strategy.buttons: Rounded-full for main CTAs (Apple style), high contrast. Primary CTA uses gradient or solid dark slate. Secondary uses glass or outline.
components_strategy.cards: Use heavy glassmorphism for pricing, solid cards for minor features.
components_strategy.charts: Shadcn charts if data is shown, keeping colors aligned with palette.

images.description: Modern office, representing SMBs and teams
Two women talking, great for advisory/consulting section
Santiago skyline to establish Chilean presence
Handshake for the 'Why Digiactiva' or final CTA

media.logo: Text logo 'DIGIACTIVA', sleek tracking, bold weight.

sections.name: Header
sections.description: Sticky glassmorphism header. Text logo 'DIGIACTIVA'. Links to Pricing, Services, FAQ. CTA: 'Hablemos' (WhatsApp link).

sections.name: Hero
sections.description: Clean, massive typography. 'Digitaliza, ordena y activa tu negocio'. Floating blurred gradient orbs (blue/emerald) in background. Primary CTA 'Inicia tu transformación' (WhatsApp) & Secondary 'Ver planes'. Floating Apple-style UI cards or dashboards nearby.

sections.name: Trust Strip
sections.description: Subtle gray logos of generic tech tools (Meta, Google, Shopify, etc.) or benefits '100% Digital', 'Atención en Chile', 'Soporte Continuo'.

sections.name: Services Overview
sections.description: 4 clean glass cards with icons (Web, Marketing, AI, Ordering) showing the pillars.

sections.name: Pricing Plans
sections.description: 5 plans side by side. Use horizontal scrolling or heavy bento grid if needed. Middle plan emphasized. Glassmorphism styling.

sections.name: Problem/Solution
sections.description: Split layout. Left: Red/Gray tones 'Caos y pérdida de tiempo'. Right: Blue/Green 'Orden, ventas y automatización'. Use Santiago skyline image or modern office image here.

sections.name: Digital Solutions & Advisory
sections.description: Combine or stack these sections. Focus on consultative approach. Use 'women talking' image.

sections.name: Digital Advertising & Additional Services
sections.description: Bento grid 'Tetris' layout highlighting specific tools like Meta Ads, Google Ads, SEO, etc.

sections.name: How it works
sections.description: 4 minimal steps, horizontal layout with a connecting line. Apple style crisp numbers.

sections.name: Why Digiactiva
sections.description: 5 benefits. List format with large typography and hover reveal effects.

sections.name: FAQ
sections.description: Shadcn Accordion. Minimalist styling, border-bottom only.

sections.name: Final CTA
sections.description: Massive text. Dark slate background or gradient. Big WhatsApp button. '¿Listo para crecer?'

sections.name: Floating Action Button
sections.description: Fixed bottom right WhatsApp icon. Green, glowing.

accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text on gradients has sufficient contrast (shadows if necessary).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Lucide React for all icons. Strict adherence to Apple-style glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl). Never use fully transparent navs without blur. DO NOT USE INTER font. Emphasize spacing (py-24 or py-32 per section). Implement smooth scrolling with Lenis or similar if possible. Build heavily customized clean Shadcn components. The layout should look high-end, uncluttered, and highly trustworthy for Chilean SMBs. Ensure WhatsApp link (https://wa.me/56951107102) is mapped to all primary CTAs and floating buttons.
